# Ground-truth description for tasks/images/ocr_card.png
#
# Baked-in factual description of the image content (no vision model needed at
# benchmark time). The image is generated by scripts/gen_vision_images.py and
# contains exactly:
#
#   - White background.
#   - The word "HELLO" in large black text in the upper portion.
#   - The number "123" in large black text directly below "HELLO".
#   - A solid RED square in the top-left corner of the image.
#   - The text "READ-THE-TEXT" in smaller black text near the bottom.
#
# Used by the 70B text judge as the reference for scoring vision-model responses.

The image is a white background containing: the word "HELLO" in large black
text in the upper area; the number "123" in large black text directly below
"HELLO"; a solid red square in the top-left corner; and the text
"READ-THE-TEXT" in smaller black text near the bottom.
